name: 格洛克18型 | AXIA
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. It has been custom painted with bright blue metallic flake paint and finished with AXIA branding. \"AXIA SPORTS—we compete so you don't have to!\"
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 这款定制涂装采用了明亮的蓝色金属闪光漆，并以AXIA品牌标志作为装饰。 “AXIA SPORTS—我来，你歇着”
